channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Tuesday, May 5, 2026
item.description: Two converging signals deserve your attention today, Midya. On AI governance, the Trump White House — ideologically anti-regulation — is now moving to gatekeep the most powerful AI models, while Google DeepMind workers are unionising over military contracts; together these sugges...
